LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PINTEREST, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. THE MATTER IS CALLED. MR. BURG STATES THAT HE IS APPEARING TO LET THE COURT KNOW THAT HE HAS SUBMITTED A PROPOSED ORDER. NO ARGUMENT IS HELD. THE COURT CONFIRMS THAT IT WILL REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER THAT WAS SUBMITTED. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PINTEREST, INC.'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing On Pinterest, Inc.S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM appearances):
Atty. Thomas Burg, Esq. of Bialson Bergen & Schwab, 650.857.9500, for Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PETITIONER PINTEREST, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

The matter is called. Mr. Burg states that he is appearing to let the Court know that he has submitted a proposed order and notes that the Court probably has not had time to review the proposed order.

NO ARGUMENT is held. The Court confirms that it will review the proposed order that was submitted. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Pinterest, Inc.'s unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.
Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Pinterest, Inc.S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award

PETITIONER PINTEREST, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.
